{
  "ip": "gray_counter",

  "owner_module": "gray_counter_core",
  "owner_file": "rtl/gray_counter_core.sv",
  "implemented_in_this_packet": {
    "function_model": [
      "state_variables.gray_state",
      "state_variables.bin_state",
      "state_variables.done_state",
      "transactions.GC_TXN_RESET",
      "transactions.GC_TXN_CLEAR",
      "transactions.GC_TXN_HOLD",
      "transactions.GC_TXN_ADVANCE (core datapath present for continuity)"
    ],
    "cycle_model_alignment": {
      "reset_style": "async_assert_sync_deassert via posedge clk or negedge rst_n",
      "priority": "reset > clear > enable > hold",
      "latency": "control sampled on edge, state committed on that edge, observed after edge"
    }
  },
  "notes": [
    "bin_value is combinational decode of current gray_state per cycle_model.latency.gray_to_bin_observation=0.",
    "done_state is explicitly cleared on reset/clear/hold and asserted only on wrap_detect during enable."
  ]
}
